summary: Tested Partner Assignment from Ad Mapping (Option C) feature. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Partner dropdown in Ad Mapping form and Partner column in table are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Partner assignment logic in webhook (lines 3191-3213): Correctly checks ad_mapping.partner_id first, then falls back to B2C default
Lead creation includes partner_id and partner_name fields (lines 3378-3380)
AdCityMapping model includes partner_id and partner_name optional fields (lines 3949-3951)
Frontend AdAnalyticsPage.jsx correctly fetches partners and displays Partner dropdown in form
Partner column in Ad Mappings table shows partner_name with Building2 icon for assigned partners
seed_data_creation: Test ad mappings and leads created via webhook tests (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Assignment Option C feature fully tested. Key scenarios verified: (1) Ad mapping with partner assigned - leads get that partner (2) Ad mapping without partner - leads get B2C default (3) Unmapped ads - leads get B2C default. Frontend shows Partner dropdown in Create Ad form and Partner column in Ad Mappings table.

Backend API Tests.test_get_partners_list: PASS - Partners API returns list with id, name, type fields
Backend API Tests.test_create_ad_mapping_with_partner: PASS - Ad mapping created with partner_id and partner_name saved
Backend API Tests.test_create_ad_mapping_without_partner: PASS - Ad mapping created without partner (null values)
Backend API Tests.test_update_ad_mapping_partner: PASS - Existing mapping can be updated to add partner
Backend API Tests.test_webhook_assigns_partner_from_ad_map: PASS - Lead created via webhook gets partner from ad_mapping
Backend API Tests.test_webhook_defaults_to_b2c_without_par: PASS - Lead gets B2C default when ad_mapping has no partner
Backend API Tests.test_webhook_defaults_to_b2c_for_unmappe: PASS - Lead gets B2C default for unmapped ad_id
Backend API Tests.test_existing_lead_creation_not_broken: PASS - Manual lead creation still works with B2C default
Backend API Tests.test_existing_ad_mapping_flow_not_broken: PASS - CRUD operations on ad mappings work correctly

Frontend UI Tests.Partner dropdown in form: PASS - Form has 'Assign to Partner (Optional)' dropdown with data-testid='ad-partner-select'
Frontend UI Tests.B2C Default option: PASS - Dropdown shows 'B2C Default (No specific partner)' as default
Frontend UI Tests.Partner options: PASS - Dropdown shows available partners like 'HDFC Bank (BANK)', 'MFCWL (B2B)'

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/settings/ad-city-mappings - List ad mappings with partner fields
POST /api/settings/ad-city-mappings - Create ad mapping with partner
POST /api/webhooks/twilio/whatsapp - Webhook assigns partner from ad_mapping
POST /api/leads - Manual lead creation with B2C default

backend_server.py.lines_3191_3213: Partner assignment from ad_mapping with B2C fallback
backend_server.py.lines_3378_3380: Lead creation includes partner_id and partner_name
backend_server.py.lines_3949_3951: AdCityMapping model has partner_id and partner_name fields

frontend_AdAnalyticsPage.jsx.lines_1828_1845: Partner dropdown in form with B2C Default option
